summary: Director Inbox row link behavior verified. All 7 features pass: 1) 'Open Pod →' is the right-aligned CTA on each row, 2) Suggested action links appear below subtitle (teal color), 3) Clicking suggested action opens Compose Modal, 4) Open Pod navigates to /support-pods/{athlete_id}, 5) Compose Modal displays To, School, Subject, Message fields correctly, 6) Top Priority 'Approve & Send' opens compose modal, 7) 'Assign coach' rows navigate to /roster instead of opening modal.
critical_code_review_comments: InboxRow correctly implements dual-action pattern: suggested-action-{id} (teal) + open-pod-{id} (gray)
handleSuggestedClick properly routes 'Assign coach' to /roster and opens ComposeModal for others
ComposeModal displays all required fields: To, School, Reason, Subject, Message
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Director Inbox row link behavior complete. Each row has: 1) Teal 'suggested action' link (data-testid='suggested-action-{id}') that opens ComposeModal, 2) Gray 'Open Pod →' link (data-testid='open-pod-{id}') that navigates to /support-pods/{athlete_id}. For 'No coach assigned' items, suggested action navigates to /roster instead. Test IDs: inbox-row-{id}, suggested-action-{id}, open-pod-{id}, compose-modal, compose-modal-overlay, compose-modal-close, compose-modal-send, compose-modal-cancel, top-priority-card, autopilot-approve-btn

verified_features.1_open_pod_right_aligned: PASS - 'Open Pod →' appears as gray right-aligned CTA on all inbox rows
verified_features.2_suggested_action_below_subtitle: PASS - Teal suggested action link appears below subtitle text (e.g., 'Check in about University of Michigan →')
verified_features.3_suggested_action_opens_modal: PASS - Clicking 'Check in about University of Michigan →' opens Compose Modal with dark overlay
verified_features.5_compose_modal_fields: PASS - Modal displays To: (athlete name), School:, Reason:, Subject:, Message textarea
verified_features.6_top_priority_approve_send: PASS - 'Approve & Send' button on Top Priority card opens Compose Modal
verified_features.7_assign_coach_navigates: PASS - 'Assign coach →' navigates to /roster instead of opening modal

suggested_actions_found: Check in about University of Michigan →
